channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump to Ask Congress to Make 15% Ethanol-Gas Blend Permanent
item.description: E15 is typically available only part of the year under an EPA waiver to help lower high gas prices.

item.title: Will mortgage rates fall in July? Four factors to weigh now
item.description: Current mortgage rates may not stay elevated through July. Here are key points to consider.

item.title: How much interest can a $45,000 CD account earn now?
item.description: A CD account can generate substantial interest in just a few months. Here is what to know.

item.title: Camp Mystic files for bankruptcy after deadly flood
item.description: The July 2025 flood at the all-girls camp killed 27 people.
